name: Procedural
limitation_note: may not state general proof explicitly

name: Diagrammatic
limitation_note: diagram can mislead if treated as one special case

name: Deductive
strength: supports general necessity and cumulative theory
limitation_note: depends on accepted axioms and implicit diagrammatic assumptions

name: Formal-logical
strength: makes proof steps explicit and inspectable
limitation_note: formal system itself has limits and assumptions

name: Machine-checked
limitation_note: requires trust in formalization, tooling, and interpretation
